headlines.title: At least 182 killed as Israel strikes central Beirut after saying Iran truce doesn't apply there
headlines.summary: Israel launched a large wave of strikes hitting southern Beirut, southern Lebanon and the eastern Bekaa Valley, hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

headlines.title: Ceasefire in the Iran war teeters with disagreements over Lebanon and the Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: The two-week ceasefire between US and Iran faces challenges as Israel expands attacks to Lebanon and Iran threatens to close the Strait of Hormuz again.

headlines.title: Iran's proposal to collect tolls in the Strait of Hormuz violates trade norms
headlines.summary: Iran's demand to act as toll booth keeper at the world's most critical oil chokepoint could leave energy markets vulnerable and hardwire higher prices.

headlines.title: Artemis crew returning to Earth with discoveries from Moon
headlines.summary: The four astronauts said they were returning to Earth with 'so many more pictures, so many more stories' from their lunar mission.

headlines.title: Trump criticises NATO as alliance chief describes meeting as 'very frank'
headlines.summary: The US president says NATO 'wasn't there when we needed them' during the Iran war.

headlines.title: Russian security agents search Novaya Gazeta Moscow office
headlines.summary: Masked security service agents were searching the independent Russian newspaper's Moscow office as part of an unspecified investigation.

headlines.title: Italy declares state of emergency over major landslide
headlines.summary: Government moved to limit disruption from a landslide that cut rail and motorway links along a key north-south transport corridor.

headlines.title: Beijing ready to work with North Korea to improve ties
headlines.summary: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said during a meeting with his North Korean counterpart on a visit to Pyongyang.

headlines.title: Kremlin says Russia has right to defend itself from 'piracy' after English Channel incident
headlines.summary: A Russian navy frigate reportedly escorted oil tankers sanctioned by Britain through the English Channel.

headlines.title: BTS delights fans with first show in $1bn world tour
headlines.summary: The pop stars will perform 85 shows across the world in their first global tour since 2019.
